name: mesos_slave
explanation: Mesos Slave (agent) exposes the same unauthenticated HTTP REST API shape as Mesos Master, on the well-known port 5051. The check GETs /state (slave-side topology, version, frameworks/executors/tasks) and /metrics/snapshot (counter snapshot) and parses JSON. Both paths are universal across Mesos versions and require no credentials in the default deployment. A generic http-path-probe to GET /state on port 5051 (verifying a JSON body with a 'version' key plus slave-shaped fields like 'id' and 'frameworks') is sufficient. DC/OS deployments need an auth_token, but those are the minority case (mirroring mesos_master).
notes: Symmetric to mesos_master (Pattern B — single canonical HTTP path). Default port 5051 is the agent port; master_port (5050) is only used to back-fill cluster_name from the master.
